30.reason: [The function getword does not return a value in all paths. When the loop breaks and EOF is not encountered, it falls through without returning anything, leading to undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [The function getword does not return a value in all paths. When the input is not EOF, it falls through without an explicit return, leading to undefined behavior. It should return a non-EOF value (e.g., 1) to indicate success.]
